channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 🦀 PentHertz/LUKSbox (430 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PentHertz

📝 Repository: PentHertz/LUKSbox

📄 Descrizione: Store sensitive files in the cloud, or on shared media without trusting the host. LUKSbox is a Rust-based encrypted-container tool with passphrase, FIDO2 (YubiKey, Titan, Nitrokey, Windows Hello), TPM 2.0, and hybrid post-quantum (ML-KEM-768 / 1024) keyslots. Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

⭐ Stelle: 430

🍴 Forks: 35

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: encryption file secure sensitive-data vault

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-06T21:47:11Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-12T04:39:20Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 ctkqiang/nezha_cyber (13 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ctkqiang

📝 Repository: ctkqiang/nezha_cyber

📄 Descrizione: 哪吒网络安全是一款高性能终端 UI (TUI) 应用，专为从事红队演练、渗透测试和漏洞研究的网络安全专业人员打造。本应用作为智能指挥控制界面，利用 DeepSeek 大语言模型提供实时流式对话、基于函数调用 (Function Calling) 的自动化工具编排，以及多智能体会话管理——这一切均在轻量级终端环境中完成。 核心设计哲学：采用 Elm Architecture (Model-Update-View) 模式，纯函数状态转换，通过 tokio::sync::mpsc 通道传递事件，遵循零成本抽象的 Rust 惯用模式。
